svg.title: lazy-alchemy v2 architecture
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing the three tiers of lazy-alchemy v2: the public API surface, the core engine with sync and async paths, and the output layer producing CustomTable, Pydantic models, and SQLModel classes, all sitting above the module-level cache and SQLAlchemy reflection layer.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me how as_pydantic() works in lazy-alchemy v2')
sendPrompt('Show me how as_pydantic_partial() works in lazy-alchemy v2')
sendPrompt('Show me how as_sqlmodel() works in lazy-alchemy v2')
